title: Solo Leveling Custom GUI
body:
**![](https://i.imgur.com/2IKdvnv.png)**

**Introduction:**
This GUI-only resource pack is inspired by the show "Solo Leveling." It is designed to work seamlessly with other resource packs—just place it on top of your existing pack. The hot bar and various container images have been customized with a purple and black palette. If you have suggestions for other color schemes, like yellow and blue, please let me know! If you encounter any bugs, report them so I can fix them promptly.

**Community Engagement:**
Join our Discord server to suggest and vote for the next pack, participate in anime discussions, and have the chance to win Discord Nitro giveaways every month. [Discord Server](https://discord.gg/RvScgzj3Ph)

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/XqD0oCHLIF8" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

**Thank you for your support! ❤️**
